question_intent: What is the average number of pit stops per race for constructors who have won at least one race in 2005?

plan.question_intent: What is the average number of pit stops per race for constructors who have won at least one race in 2005?
plan.detail_query: SELECT r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name AS constructor_name, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stop_count FROM races r JOIN results re ON r.raceid = re.raceid JOIN constructors c ON re.constructorid = c.constructorid JOIN pitstops p ON re.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid WHERE r.year = 2005 AND c.constructorid IN (SELECT DISTINCT cr.constructorid FROM constructorresults cr JOIN races ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid WHERE ra.year = 2005 AND cr.points > 0) GROUP BY r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name HAVING COUNT(p.stop) > 0 ORDER BY pit_stop_count DESC

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name AS constructor_name, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stop_count
join_clauses: JOIN results re ON r.raceid = re.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON re.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN pitstops p ON re.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
where_clauses: c.constructorid IN (SELECT DISTINCT cr.constructorid FROM constructorresults cr JOIN races ra ON cr.raceid = ra.raceid WHERE ra.year = 2005 AND cr.points > 0)
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name

steps.sql:
SELECT r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name AS constructor_name, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stop_count
FROM races r
JOIN results re ON r.raceid = re.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON re.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN pitstops p ON r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (r.year IN (SELECT DISTINCT ra.year FROM races ra))
GROUP BY r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name
HAVING (COUNT(p.stop) > 0)

SELECT r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name AS constructor_name, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stop_count
FROM races r
JOIN results re ON r.raceid = re.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON re.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN pitstops p ON r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (r.year IN (SELECT DISTINCT ra.year FROM races ra))
GROUP BY r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name
HAVING (COUNT(p.stop) > 0)

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the average number of pit stops per race for constructors who have won at least one race in 2005

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name AS constructor_name, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stop_count
FROM races r
JOIN results re ON r.raceid = re.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON re.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN pitstops p ON r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (r.year IN (SELECT DISTINCT ra.year FROM races ra))
GROUP BY r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name
HAVING (COUNT(p.stop) > 0)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.pit_stop_count)
FROM (SELECT r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name AS constructor_name, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stop_count
FROM races r
JOIN results re ON r.raceid = re.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON re.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN pitstops p ON r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (r.year IN (SELECT DISTINCT ra.year FROM races ra))
GROUP BY r.raceid, r.year, r.round, c.constructorid, c.name
HAVING (COUNT(p.stop) > 0)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.pit_stop_count)
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, r.raceid, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stop_count
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN pitstops AS p ON r.driverid = p.driverid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE (r.positionorder <= 10) AND (c.nationality IN ('British', 'French', 'German', 'Italian', 'Spanish', 'Belgian', 'Swedish', 'Dutch', 'Austrian', 'Finnish'))
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, r.raceid) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of pit stops per constructor per race across all races?
